text: Why you shouldn't really.. @ tussttamaanitia. @ sararcarn e Admin overhead - managing EC2 and DBHost e Backup / DR Management ¢ EC2 is single AZ e Features - some of AWS DB products are amazing ¢ EC2 is ON or OFF - no serverless, no easy scaling ¢ Replication - skills, setup time, monitoring & effectiveness e Performance... AWS invest time into optimisation & features
